name: Appointment on a holiday
description: Patient tries to schedule an appointment on a holiday, not knowing the office is closed.
goal: Schedule a routine checkup on Thanksgiving Day; agree to an alternate date if informed of closure.
behavior: Request an appointment specifically on Thanksgiving
Quickly agree to the next available date once informed of the holiday closure
success_criteria: Agent clearly communicates the office's closure on Thanksgiving
Agent suggests alternative dates in the same week
Patient agrees to reschedule the appointment on a non-holiday
orchestrator_hint: Patient attempts to schedule an appointment on a holiday, unaware the office is closed.
